text:
everyone is stuck using stock photos for skincare app promos.

we just dropped an acne reaction package built for transformation content:

> mirror breakouts discovery
> frustrated skin checking
> crying over acne flare-ups
> close-up skin problem stress

real bathroom footage.

negative emotions are generating 10x more views.

trust me on this.

people like drama. they want to know what not to do, how not to be, what will happen if they don't stop doing that thing.

we've created more than 600 face reactions in 20+ emotions.

here are the top 5:
> anger

Crying emotion is impossible to fake with AI.

This is the perfect format to promote your app!

> crying girl
> problem you are solving
> your app

The harsh reality is that people are more interested in negativity rather than in positivity.

Drama is the true authentic content

I analyzed 10,000 Jenni AI tiktok viral videos and found top 5 emotions that generate 80% of the views:

> confused
> frustrated
> struggling
> “whaaaat?”
> tired in bed

They’re easy to capture: 5–7 seconds, a clear hook, filmed on your phone, no script needed.

The real

100 Real UGC reaction videos at $0.5/vid

- Real people, no AI
- raw videos (no hooks, unedited, no filter)
- 5-10 seconds each

reply "RealUGC" to get access (must be following)

1.3 Million views from DansUGC reaction hook.

the package cost was $60 for 100 videos.

they already generated over 2M views in less than 7 days.

Doesn't matter if it was posted already.

add a viral hook text and a 6-7 app demo and you have everything you need to go viral on
